info.title: ContainerServiceAIManagerClient
info.description: Azure Kubernetes AI Manager api client.

get.description: List the operations for the provider
List AIManager resources by subscription ID

parameters.name: aiModelName
parameters.description: The name of the AI model resource. Derived from the upstream model id by replacing the publisher separator `/` with `--` (e.g. upstream `microsoft/Phi-4-mini-instruct` becomes `microsoft--Phi-4-mini-instruct`). Because Hugging Face repo ids forbid `--`, this mapping is unambiguously reversible. Allowed characters: letters, digits, `.`, `-`, `_`.

post.description: Calculates projected hourly compute cost for deploying this model on the GPU SKUs available to the caller subscription. No Kubernetes or Azure resources are provisioned.

parameters.name: aiModelName

Because Hugging Face repo ids forbid `--`, this mapping is unambiguously reversible. Allowed characters: letters, digits, `.`, `-`, `_`.

post.description: Rotates the API keys for the namespace-scoped LLM gateway. The current `secondaryKey` is promoted to become the new `primaryKey`, and a fresh `secondaryKey` is generated. This enables zero-downtime rotation: clients that have already switched to the previous secondary key continue to work, while the old primary key is invalidated. Returns the updated access information.

AIManager.description: The AI Manager resource. For more information, see https://aka.ms/aks/aimanager.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

eTag.description: If eTag is provided in the response body, it may also be provided as a header per the normal etag convention.  Entity tags are used for comparing two or more entities from the same requested resource. HTTP/1.1 uses entity tags in the etag (section 14.19), If-Match (section 14.24), If-None-Match (section 14.26), and If-Range (section 14.27) header fields.

identity.description: The managed service identities assigned to this resource.

AIManagerListResult.description: The response of a AIManager list operation.

value.description: The AIManager items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

Entity tags are used for comparing two or more entities from the same requested resource. HTTP/1.1 uses entity tags in the etag (section 14.19), If-Match (section 14.24), If-None-Match (section 14.26), and If-Range (section 14.27) header fields.

AIManagerNamespaceListResult.description: The response of a AIManagerNamespace list operation.

value.description: The AIManagerNamespace items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

provisioningState.description: The status of the last operation.

labels.description: Labels applied to the Kubernetes namespace.

annotations.description: Annotations applied to the Kubernetes namespace.

AIManagerNamespaceProvisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the AI Manager namespace resource.

values.name: Creating
values.description: The provisioning state of a namespace being created.

values.name: Updating
values.description: The provisioning state of a namespace being updated.

values.name: Deleting
values.description: The provisioning state of a namespace being deleted.

AIManagerPatch.description: The AI Manager resource patch model.

identity.description: The managed service identities assigned to this resource.

provisioningState.description: The status of the last operation.

deletePolicy.description: Delete options of the AI Manager. Defaults to `Delete` if not specified.

managedResourceGroupName.description: The name of the managed resource group created by the AI Manager to hold underlying infrastructure resources.

AIManagerProvisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the AI Manager resource.

AIModel.description: An AI model exposed by Microsoft.ContainerService. Read-only, globally-shared catalog entry that is platform-maintained and auto-provisioned by the resource provider; identical across regions and subscriptions. Can be referenced by `ModelDeployment` resources.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

AIModelListResult.description: The response of a AIModel list operation.

value.description: The AIModel items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

modelId.description: The Hugging Face model identifier in `<org>/<repo>` form, e.g. `microsoft/Phi-4-mini-instruct`. Uniquely identifies the upstream model that backs this catalog entry.

description.description: An optional, free-form description of the model.

AIModelResourceId.description: The ARM resource id of an AIModel.

AutoscaleProfile.description: Autoscaling configuration: scale replica count between a minimum and maximum.

maxReplicas.description: The maximum number of replicas. If not specified, the service derives a default from the subscription GPU quota.

Azure.ResourceManager.ResourceProvisioni.description: The provisioning state of a resource type.

CalculateCostPlan.description: A GPU SKU pricing plan returned by the `calculateCost` action.

vmSize.description: Azure VM SKU, e.g. "Standard_ND96isr_H100_v5". Matches the value accepted by `ModelDeploymentProperties.vmSize`.

vmsPerReplica.description: Number of vms required to host one replica on this SKU.

vmHourlyPrice.description: On-demand hourly price for a single vm of this SKU, in `currency`.

totalHourlyPrice.description: Projected hourly cost for one replica (`vmsPerReplica` vms), in `currency`. Omitted when the plan is infeasible.

priceAsOf.description: UTC timestamp of the price snapshot used for this plan. Overrides any response-level snapshot if present.

feasible.description: Whether the caller can actually deploy this plan today (region availability, GPU quota, model fit, ...).

infeasibleError.description: Error detail explaining why the plan is not deployable. Omitted when `feasible=true`.

CalculateCostResponse.description: Response body for the AI model `calculateCost` action.

plans.description: Ranked list of GPU SKU pricing plans. Feasible plans first, ordered by `totalHourlyPrice` ascending; infeasible plans last.

CredentialValue.description: A credential value. Exactly one variant must be set.

inline.description: An inline credential containing a secret value supplied in the request payload.

DeletePolicy.description: Delete options of the AI Manager.

values.name: Keep
values.description: Keep the underlying cluster resources even if the AIManager resource is deleted.

values.name: Delete
values.description: Delete both the underlying cluster resources and the AIManager resource together.

InfeasibleCode.description: The reason a `CalculateCostPlan` is not deployable.

values.name: InsufficientQuota
values.description: The caller's subscription does not have enough GPU quota in the target region to deploy this plan.

values.name: RegionUnavailable
values.description: The VM SKU is not available in the target region.

values.name: InefficientDeployment
values.description: The deployment can start successfully on this SKU, but its measured runtime performance falls below the acceptable threshold for serving this model.

InfeasibleError.description: Error detail explaining why a `CalculateCostPlan` is not deployable.

value.description: The access token, password, or other secret value.

ModelDeployment.description: A running deployment of a model in an AI Manager namespace.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

eTag.description: If eTag is provided in the response body, it may also be provided as a header per the normal etag convention.  Entity tags are used for comparing two or more entities from the same requested resource. HTTP/1.1 uses entity tags in the etag (section 14.19), If-Match (section 14.24), If-None-Match (section 14.26), and If-Range (section 14.27) header fields.

ModelDeploymentListResult.description: The response of a ModelDeployment list operation.

value.description: The ModelDeployment items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

ModelDeploymentOverrides.description: User overrides for a model deployment.

values.description: Free-form override key/value pairs. Recognized keys are documented per release.

ModelDeploymentPerformanceMode.description: The runtime performance mode of a model deployment.

values.name: Balanced
values.description: A balanced trade-off between latency and throughput (default).

provisioningState.description: The status of the last reconciliation.

modelResourceId.description: Full ARM resource id of the model to deploy. Phase 1 accepts an `AIModel` resource id only. Immutable after creation.

modelSourceResourceId.description: Full ARM resource id of a `ModelSource` to use when pulling artifacts for this deployment. Immutable after creation.

vmSize.description: Azure VM SKU used to host the deployment, e.g. "Standard_NC96ads_A100_v4". Immutable after creation.

scale.description: Scaling configuration for the deployment. Provide either `manual` (fixed replica count) or `autoscale` (autoscaling between min/max replicas), but not both.

overrides.description: User overrides layered on top of profile resolution.

status.description: Runtime status, populated once reconciliation begins.

ModelDeploymentProvisioningState.description: The provisioning state of a model deployment resource.

ModelDeploymentStatus.description: The runtime status of a model deployment. All fields are read-only and populated once reconciliation has started.

endpoint.description: The inference endpoint URL exposed by the deployment, once ready.

engine.description: The inference engine used to serve the model, e.g. "vllm".

engineVersion.description: The version of the inference engine, e.g. "0.17".

maxModelLen.description: The maximum model context length, in tokens, configured for this deployment.

quantization.description: The quantization level applied to the model weights, e.g. "fp16", "awq-int4".

desiredReplicas.description: The desired replica count reported by the controller. Equals `properties.scale.manual.replicas` when manual scaling is used; current target replica count derived from autoscaler otherwise.

currentReplicas.description: The current number of ready replicas serving traffic.

peakTokensPerMinute.description: The peak tokens per minute measured by live stress test.

estimatedProvisionTimeSeconds.description: Estimated total time, in seconds, for the deployment to become ready end-to-end (GPU vm provisioning, image/weight pull, engine warm-up).

ModelSource.description: A model source registered with an AI Manager. Describes an external model registry (e.g. Hugging Face) and the credentials the platform uses to pull artifacts from it.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

eTag.description: If eTag is provided in the response body, it may also be provided as a header per the normal etag convention.  Entity tags are used for comparing two or more entities from the same requested resource. HTTP/1.1 uses entity tags in the etag (section 14.19), If-Match (section 14.24), If-None-Match (section 14.26), and If-Range (section 14.27) header fields.

ModelSourceListResult.description: The response of a ModelSource list operation.

value.description: The ModelSource items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

provisioningState.description: The status of the last operation.

sourceType.description: Model source type. Constrains the legal authentication kinds. Immutable after creation.

description.description: An optional, free-form description of the source.

credential.description: Credential the platform uses to authenticate to the source. Optional for public sources (e.g. ungated Hugging Face models).

ModelSourceResourceId.description: The ARM resource id of a ModelSource.

ModelSourceType.description: The type of a model source.

NamespaceAccessInfo.description: Access information for an AI Manager namespace, including the OpenAI-compatible gateway endpoint and the API keys used to authenticate against it.

primaryKey.description: Primary API key. Send as `Authorization: Bearer <key>` (or `api-key: <key>`, depending on client). Treat as secret; do not log or persist in plaintext.

secondaryKey.description: Secondary API key, for zero-downtime rotation. Same usage as `primaryKey`.

lastRotatedAt.description: UTC time the keys were last rotated. Clients can use this to detect rotation and refresh cached credentials.

ModelSpec.description: The specification of a model. All fields are read-only.

license.description: The license of the model, when known. SPDX license identifier, e.g. `mit`, `apache-2.0`.

isRestricted.description: Whether access to the model is restricted and requires credential.

maxContextLength.description: The maximum context length supported by the model, in tokens.

ScalingProfile.description: Scaling configuration for a model deployment. Exactly one of `manual` or `autoscale` must be set.

manual.description: Manual scaling configuration with a fixed replica count. Mutually exclusive with `autoscale`.

ManualScalingProfile.description: Manual scaling configuration: fixed replica count.
